name: Mobility Transportation
recent_news: No public M&A or news identified. Address 1200 State Cir, Ann Arbor associates with Emergent Health Partners/Huron Valley Ambulance complex (NEMT). Unable to confirm 'Mobility Transportation' as a standalone school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Likely a NEMT/paratransit/wheelchair van operation rather than school-bus contractor; minimal evidence of district contracts. Low priority tuck-in unless verified as SPED operator.

name: Integrity Medivan
owner_or_parent: independent (affiliated with A-TEC Ambulance Inc., Dave Davis owner)
recent_news: Integrity Wheelchair Transport (DBA Integrity Medivan) operates from 340/338 Commerce Dr Crystal Lake alongside A-TEC Ambulance (founded 1986, Dave Davis CEO). NEMT/wheelchair-van service for seniors and disabled in Chicago suburbs; no M&A news identified.
fit_notes: Wheelchair/NEMT operator, not a traditional school-bus contractor. Possible SPED tuck-in if it carries district contracts, but core service is medical wheelchair transport. Low fit for Summit unless expanding into SPED.

name: Kent Limousines LLC
recent_news: Small LLC formed 3/15/2001 by Malcolm Johns; sister entities include Kent Transportation Inc, Kent Livery Service Inc, Kent Worldwide Car Service, Bluevision LLC. No school-bus or SPED services identified. BBB lists 2 employees.
fit_notes: Limo/livery operator, not a student-transportation contractor. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Employee count in source data (62) likely overstated; BBB shows 2.

name: Blakes Limosne & Sedan Svc LLC
recent_news: No public footprint identified; no website, no school/SPED contracts visible. Name and corporate form (LLC) suggest small Marin County limo/sedan livery operation.
fit_notes: Limo/sedan service, not a school-bus or SPED operator. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in acquisitions.

name: Dublin Limo & Airport
recent_news: No verifiable web presence under exact name 'Dublin Limo & Airport'; multiple competing Dublin/Pleasanton limo operators dominate search results. No school-bus or SPED activity identified. WHEELS (LAVTA) and Pleasanton Paratransit serve student/paratransit needs in this market.
fit_notes: Airport-limo/black-car operator, not a student-transportation contractor. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in.
